hero.headline: Transforming into a Super Holding Company.
hero.description: Bike has evolved from a bicycle distribution company into a diversified super holding group, creating enduring value across energy, logistics, finance, healthcare, and infrastructure — operating in 15 countries.

overview.title: Who We Are
overview.paragraph1: Bike has transformed from a bicycle distribution company into a diversified super holding group. Our portfolio spans energy, logistics, finance, healthcare, and infrastructure, with operations across 15 countries. We are committed to creating enduring value through responsible business practices and sustainable growth.
overview.paragraph2: Our transformation reflects a strategic vision to diversify and strengthen our business foundation. By expanding into multiple high-growth sectors, we aim to build long-term value for shareholders, partners, and communities while maintaining the highest standards of corporate governance.

vision.label: Vision
vision.statement: To be a leading super holding company creating enduring value across industries through responsible business practices, innovation, and sustainable growth.

culture.title: Our Culture
culture.subtitle: Growing Together Through Human-Centered Values.
culture.introduction: At Bike, we believe that people are at the heart of every successful journey. Our culture is built on respect, integrity, and collaboration — empowering every individual to grow while contributing to a sustainable future.

management.title: Management Profile
management.introduction: Meet the experienced leaders guiding Bike through strategic growth, innovation, and responsible corporate governance.
management.placeholder: Management profiles will be available soon. Please check back later.

distribution.title: Distribution Network
distribution.subtitle: Reaching Every Corner of Indonesia
distribution.description: Bike's distribution network spans the archipelago, ensuring that quality bicycles and after-sales service are accessible to communities nationwide.

closing.headline: Building a Sustainable Future Together.
closing.description: With a commitment to responsible business practices, innovation, and strategic partnerships, Bike continues to create enduring value across industries for shareholders, partners, and communities.

hero.headline: Trusted Bicycle Brands for Every Journey.
hero.description: PT Bike Tbk offers a diverse portfolio of bicycle brands designed to serve every market segment — from children to professionals — supporting healthier lifestyles and sustainable mobility across Indonesia.

introduction.title: Competitive Across Every Market Segment
introduction.paragraph1: PT Bike Tbk offers one of Indonesia's most diverse bicycle portfolios, covering every age group from toddlers to adults.
introduction.paragraph2: Our products support transportation, sports, recreation, health, fashion, and modern lifestyles, positioning the Company to serve diverse customer needs.
introduction.paragraph3: Indonesia's demographic bonus creates long-term opportunities for sustainable mobility, while growing environmental awareness increases demand for bicycles as part of the New Economy.
introduction.paragraph4: Each brand is strategically positioned to serve different market segments with strong competitiveness and clear market identity.

cta.title: Explore Our Complete Product Portfolio
cta.description: Visit each brand website to discover the latest collections, specifications, and dealer information.

hero.title: Corporate Governance
hero.description: Our commitment to transparency, accountability, and responsible business practices.

governance.placeholder: Governance content will be available here soon.

hero.headline: Building Value Across Industries.
hero.description: From our origins in bicycle distribution to our transformation into a diversified super holding group, we continue to create enduring value across energy, logistics, finance, healthcare, and infrastructure.

introduction.title: Our Business Identity
introduction.paragraph1: Bike has evolved from a single-focus bicycle distribution company into a diversified super holding group. Our business portfolio spans multiple high-growth sectors, each managed with a commitment to excellence, innovation, and sustainable value creation.
introduction.paragraph2: Our transformation reflects a strategic vision to build a resilient business foundation that can adapt to changing market dynamics while delivering consistent value to shareholders, partners, and communities across 15 countries.

extension.title: Business Extension
extension.description: Expanding our reach and capacity to serve markets more effectively.
extension.card1Description: Extending our presence into new geographic markets and customer segments across multiple regions.
extension.card2Description: Investing in infrastructure, technology, and people to scale operations and meet growing demand.
extension.card3Description: Building strategic partnerships and distribution channels to deepen market penetration and service quality.

development.title: Business Development
development.description: Driving growth through innovation, research, and continuous improvement.
development.card1Description: Fostering a culture of innovation across all business sectors to develop new solutions and stay ahead of market trends.
development.card2Description: Investing in research initiatives to explore emerging technologies and identify new business opportunities.
development.card3Description: Pursuing strategic acquisitions, joint ventures, and partnerships to accelerate business development.

diversification.title: Business Diversification
diversification.description: Our journey from a single-product company to a diversified super holding group represents a fundamental transformation of our business model.
diversification.paragraph: By expanding into energy, logistics, finance, healthcare, and infrastructure, we have built a resilient portfolio that balances stability with growth — positioning Bike for long-term success across multiple industries.
